name: Translation & Languages
description: AI translation is being used in hospitals, courtrooms, and immigration offices right now. Most AI builders speak one language and think accuracy means matching words. You know it doesn't.
trajectory: Knowing when 'correct' is still dangerously wrong is safety-critical AI evaluation — and almost nobody doing AI evaluation speaks more than one language.
Cross-cultural communication and nuance maps to internationalisation governance for AI systems deployed globally.
Quality assurance across languages is multilingual AI testing — chronically neglected in AI safety.
Translating AI safety materials into other languages is international fieldbuilding — desperately needed work.

projects.title: Find dangerous translation errors
projects.description: Run medical or legal documents through AI translation into your strongest language. Document where errors could get someone hurt.

projects.title: Translate AI safety resources
projects.description: Translate key AI safety materials into your native language to help build the international AI safety community.

projects.title: Cross-cultural AI safety perspectives
projects.description: Write about AI safety from your cultural perspective — what gets lost in English-only discourse?
